summary: End-to-end validation of Artham Aesthetique first build. Backend: all 5 pytest tests pass (root, bookings CRUD, newsletter idempotency, callbacks, chat SSE stream with real Claude Sonnet 4.5 deltas + [DONE]). Frontend: home, mega menu (9 categories), mobile drawer, category page (15 skin services), service page (hero/what/how/benefits/faqs/related all render, FAQ accordion expands), doctor profile, blog (6 posts), all 4 policy pages, complete 3-step booking flow (persisted to Mongo, reference id + WhatsApp button on confirmation), chatbot streaming actual Claude response, contact callback (toast confirmed), newsletter (input clears indicating success).

issues: Hero uses generic Aman-style resort/pool imagery (intentional editorial vibe per PRD but not clinical). Placeholder Unsplash imagery for doctor portrait and treatment photos was flagged by main agent for future replacement.
No visible success toast after subscribe (input clears silently). Consider adding an inline 'Thank you, you're subscribed' confirmation for better UX.

action_items: (Non-blocking) Add explicit visible success message for footer newsletter submit.
(Non-blocking, as flagged) Replace placeholder Unsplash imagery for Dr. Omaima portrait and treatment photos with real clinical assets.
(Non-blocking, as flagged) Register service worker (manifest exists).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: chat endpoint correctly streams SSE with Cache-Control:no-cache and X-Accel-Buffering:no; persistence of both user and assistant messages implemented.
server.py: newsletter POST is properly idempotent (returns existing sub without duplicate insert).
server.py: all list endpoints exclude Mongo _id via projection — good.
server.py uses on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI — consider lifespan handlers (minor).
No pagination/limit on GET /api/bookings beyond hard-coded 500 — acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created bookings (TEST_User, TEST_Bookflow2), newsletter subs (test_nl_*@example.com), callback (TEST_Contact, TEST_Contact2) via API and UI submissions. All prefixed with TEST_ for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: First-pass build fully validated. Booking modal advances Step 2 → Step 3 via a CONTINUE button (not auto-advance) — remember to click Continue after selecting date+time. Chatbot took ~7-9s to stream a full response from Claude Sonnet 4.5. Confirmation shows 8-char uppercase reference id (first 8 chars of UUID).
